chapters.name: Roots and Family Origins
chapters.introduction: Every family has a story that begins before we were born. Let's explore where your family came from.

chapters.name: Birth and Early Childhood
chapters.introduction: The very beginning of your life story. Let's talk about the day you were born and your earliest memories.

chapters.name: Home and Neighbourhood
chapters.introduction: The place where you grew up shaped who you became. Tell me about it.

chapters.name: School Days
chapters.introduction: School is where we first discover the world beyond our family. What do you remember?

chapters.name: Friends and Growing Up
chapters.introduction: The people we grow up with become part of our story. Tell me about your friends.

chapters.name: Dreams and Youth
chapters.introduction: When we are young, everything feels possible. What did you dream about?

chapters.name: Education and Learning
chapters.introduction: Learning shapes us in ways we don't always realize. What stayed with you?

chapters.name: First Job and Career
chapters.introduction: Work takes up so much of our lives. Tell me about your working years.

chapters.name: Love and Relationships
chapters.introduction: Love is one of life's greatest gifts. How did it find you?

chapters.name: Marriage and Partnership
chapters.introduction: Building a life with someone is a beautiful journey. Tell me about yours.

chapters.name: Parenthood
chapters.introduction: Becoming a parent changes everything. What was it like for you?

chapters.name: Home and Family Life
chapters.introduction: The home you built holds so many memories. Tell me about it.

chapters.name: Festivals, Food and Traditions
chapters.introduction: The traditions we keep connect us to our roots and to each other.

chapters.name: Challenges and Difficult Times
chapters.introduction: Life isn't always easy. How did you find your way through the hard times?

chapters.name: Successes and Turning Points
chapters.introduction: Some moments change the direction of our lives. Tell me about yours.

chapters.name: Faith, Values and Beliefs
chapters.introduction: What we believe in shapes how we live. What guides you?

chapters.name: Travel and Adventures
chapters.introduction: The places we go and the things we see become part of who we are.

chapters.name: Wisdom and Life Lessons
chapters.introduction: A life well-lived teaches us things no school ever could.

chapters.name: Legacy for Future Generations
chapters.introduction: What you leave behind matters. What do you want future generations to know?

chapters.name: Final Reflections
chapters.introduction: As we near the end of our conversation, what matters most to you?
